channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Extended interview with J.K. Simmons
item.description: In this web exclusive, the Oscar-winning actor from "Whiplash" discusses his roles and career with correspondent Tracy Smith.

item.title: Suspect sought in shooting of 8 people, including 4 children, in Coney Island: NYPD
item.description: Eight people, including four children, were shot during a Fourth of July family barbecue in Brooklyn's Coney Island.

item.title: WATCH: Vessels from around the world participate in parade of tall ships up Hudson River
item.description: In a spectacular Fourth of July event, a parade of tall ships sailed up the Hudson River in New York City in the largest maritime display.

item.title: Transcript: Reps. Adriano Espaillat and Carlos Gimenez on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," July 5, 2026
item.description: The following is the full transcript of an interview with Reps. Adriano Espaillat (D-NY) and Carlos Gimenez (R-FL) on the program.
